message:
fix(missions): waiting_input recovery, cancel guard, runbook context, timeout restore (#6917)

- #6912/#6913: Include waiting_input missions in reconnect/reload recovery
  (loadMissions, onopen candidates, onclose marking) so they resume or
  fail gracefully instead of becoming permanent zombies
- #6914: Check cancelIntents and current mission status before resending
  during the reconnect delay window to prevent canceled missions from
  executing
- #6915: Await runbook execution and inject evidence into the AI diagnosis
  prompt instead of fire-and-forget, so diagnosis is grounded in real
  cluster data
- #6916: Restart the waiting_input timeout watchdog after reconnect resend
  so missions don't hang indefinitely when the original timer was cleared

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -120,7 +120,7 @@ export function useAlerts() {
       acknowledgeAlerts: () => {},
       resolveAlert: () => {},
       deleteAlert: () => {},
-      runAIDiagnosis: (() => null) as (alertId: string) => string | null,
+      runAIDiagnosis: (() => null) as (alertId: string) => Promise<string | null> | string | null,
       evaluateConditions: () => {},
       isLoadingData: false,
       dataError: null as string | null }
